description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in supervised autonomous mode, was at a complete stop in response to a red light on 
southbound Laguna Street at the intersection with McAllister Street. Another vehicle approaching from the rear made contact with the 
Cruise AV's rear bumper, damaging the rear right bumper. The driver of the other vehicle left the scene without exchanging information. 
There were no injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
